title: cracca lathyroides
intro: Cracca lathyroides, also known as wild pea or lentil, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Cracca lathyroides include reducing symptoms of urinary tract infections, alleviating menstrual cramps, and relieving bronchitis and coughs. Cracca lathyroides can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tea, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
